mapper.select: SELECT DATE(create_time) AS day, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM consult_appointment WHERE deleted = 0 AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY day ASC
SELECT DATE(create_time) AS day, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM consult_thread WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY day ASC
SELECT DATE(create_time) AS day, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM assessment WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY day ASC
SELECT level AS level, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM assessment GROUP BY level ORDER BY cnt DESC
